commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: 1 Esdras Wisdom of Solomon Wisdom of Sirach Epistle of Jeremiah Prayer of Manasseh That every man should let his manservant, and every man his maidservant, being a Hebrew or a Hebrewess, go free; that none should enslave them, that is, a Jew his brother. The sabbatical year happened in the 9th of Sedecias, when the Chaldeans approaching, caused him to show some signs of religion. But when they departed to meet the Egyptians, the people repented of what they had done well. (Calmet) Such a relapse offends God more than the former sins, as our Saviour shows by a parable, Matthew xviii. (Worthington).

methodology.step_1: Parse main page with BeautifulSoup for structure
methodology.step_3: Use Firecrawl to get full content from 'Go to Commentary' links
methodology.step_4: Fallback to BeautifulSoup for accordion content if needed
advantages: Records verses even without commentaries for complete tracking
